text.title: LLM-Friendly Architecture Core Principles
text.summary: Ten concrete rules for structuring a codebase to minimize AI edit errors: file size limits, flat directories, self-documenting names, explicit imports, data extraction, type colocation, single responsibility, consistent naming, JSDoc for complex functions, and thin page components.

rule.statement: Keep source files between 100-300 lines. Files over 300 lines require splitting; files over 800 lines are blocked.
rule.rationale: LLMs produce off-by-one line errors, missed dependencies, and dropped code when editing large files due to context truncation. Small files are correctness requirements for AI-assisted work.

rule.statement: Page/Route: target 30-50, max 100 lines. Feature component: 80-150, max 250. UI component: 50-100, max 150. Hook: 30-80, max 120. Utility: 20-50, max 80. Data file: 50-200, max 300.
rule.rationale: Different file types have different natural sizes; one limit for all creates unnecessary splits.

rule.statement: Limit nesting to 3 levels maximum. Use flat layouts: components/ (flat), features/ (one level deep), utils/ (flat).
rule.rationale: LLMs navigate by globbing. Deep nesting requires more tool calls to find files and increases probability of targeting the wrong path.

example.code: src/ components/ (flat — Button.tsx, Input.tsx, Modal.tsx) features/auth/ LoginForm.tsx, SignupForm.tsx, use-auth.ts features/dashboard/ DashboardStats.tsx, use-dashboard.ts data/ pricing.ts, navigation.ts hooks/ use-media-query.ts utils/ format-currency.ts, format-date.ts types/ api.ts, domain.ts pages/ index.tsx (30-50 lines each)

rule.statement: Name files after what they do: price-calculator.ts, use-auth.ts, pricing-plans.ts. Use direct imports, not barrel re-exports.
rule.rationale: Ambiguous names (utils.ts, helpers.ts) cause agents to open the wrong file. Barrel re-exports cause agents to edit the barrel rather than the implementation.

rule.statement: Extract static data arrays to src/data/. Colocate types used in one component; centralize types used in 3+ files to types/.
rule.rationale: Data co-located in components inflates files past 800 lines. Centralizing all types creates a large file agents must fully scan.

rule.statement: Page components must be orchestrators only: import from features/, compose, return JSX. No data fetching, state management, or calculations in page files. Target 30-50 lines.
rule.rationale: Thin pages keep the highest-traffic entry points easy for agents to read and modify. Implementing logic in pages spreads concerns across multiple places that need updating together.

rule.statement: Add JSDoc to complex or business-domain functions with @param descriptions and @returns explanation. Include a # LLM note: comment for functions with non-obvious constraints.
rule.rationale: Agents read doc comments before implementation when planning edits. A clear JSDoc allows the agent to understand intent without loading the full function body into context.

text.reference: Bash audit script: find files over line limit and barrel re-exports
CLAUDE.md skeleton for documenting project structure to LLMs
